title: [MTR4] JR East E531 Series | JR東日本 E531系
description: The Resourcepack that adds E531 to Minecraft via Minecraft transit railway
body:
# Orerview
The E531 series (Japanese: E531系, Hepburn: E531-kei) is an electric multiple unit (EMU) train type operated by East Japan Railway Company (JR East) in Japan. It was introduced by JR East on 9 July 2005 to replace the aging 403 and 415 series EMUs running on the Jōban Line from Ueno Station in Tokyo. The stock is a dual-voltage (1,500 V DC & 20 kV AC) development of the DC-only E231 series suburban EMU design, and can run at speeds of up to 130 km/h (81 mph) in
service.                                                                                     
To celebrate the 60th anniversary of the Katsuta Depot, set K451 entered service on 5 November 2021 in a wrapping reminiscent of the livery of the 401 series trains. Set K423 also received this wrapping in March 2023. The two sets are scheduled to carry this livery until the first quarter of 2026.
## This pack includes:
### JR East E531:
![E531 Joban](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fa30f7481f81f20bcdf05f7384cd85db485fcb0.png)
![E531 Joban_](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc37b286e91ea2b45681f365a2080cff9dc7d26f.png)
### New motor sound for:
- E531 series
# My suggestion:
- Acceleration and deceleration: 2.5 - 2.9 km/h/s
- Average speed: 80 - 140 km/h
# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, East Japan Railway Company                                                                              
**Tested on Minecraft 1.20.1 MTR 4.0.3 Forge**
